seed.question: Based on the table on page 41, in column "1990", compute the percentage by which the value in row "Net Emissions (Sources and Sinks)" (5560.2) differs from the value in row "Total Gross Emissions (Sources)" (6536.9). Report only the final result as a signed percentage with two decimals.

metadata.audit_note: B1 fix: original compared header row 'Gas/Source' (1990 header) with -19.4 — meaningless. Reformulated to two truly comparable values in the same column.

pages.text:
Figure ES-1: U.S. Greenhouse Gas Emissions and Sinks by Gas
a The term “flux” is used to describe the exchange of CO to and from the atmosphere, with net flux being either positive or
2

2
